CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Or Preclude Bill Of Particulars (Discovery)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Miguel Soto, Esq. of the Law Office of Miguel Soto, Tel. 408.833.5456, for defendant and moving party;
Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. of Your Community Lawyer, Tel. 510.985.9250, specially appearing for plaintiff.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Before hearing, the Court was presented with a copy of the opposition for review. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Agustin Vasquez's Motion to Compel or Preclude Bill of Particulars is GRANTED. Parties are to meet and confer and submit a joint proposed order to the Court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302)
